rows.label: qev035702_MSG0001
rows.name: So you came without running away, lower lifeform...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0002
rows.name: You will now atone for the sin of killing my sister.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0003
rows.name:
First, I have taken the liberty of planting a time bomb
on this foolish Slovity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0004
rows.name:
She only has 5 minutes left to live...
But rest assured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0005
rows.name:
I won't let her go alone.
I will execute you right alongside her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0006
rows.name:
Therefore... suffer and die together happily!
While repenting for your grave sins!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0007
rows.name:
The bomb came off...! ?
...Am I saved?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0008
rows.name:
Dammit! I don't know if it's the lingering effect of that suit,
but the moment I stood in front of her,
my body suddenly stopped moving... resulting in this mess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0009
rows.name:
Somehow, right at the very end, I ended up making you
clean up my mess again. I'm so pathetic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035702_SEL0011
rows.name: Point out Slovity's carelessness.

rows.label: qev035702_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035702_SEL0021
rows.name:
Console her, saying it couldn't be helped
if she couldn't move.

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yeah... Causing trouble and not even being able to protect myself,
I don't have the right to do reckless things anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0011
rows.name:
You're absolutely right. From now on...
I'll become stronger so that I can afford to be reckless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0012
rows.name:
...When you say it like that,
it makes me feel even more pathetic...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm embarrassed... I really...
I need to become stronger, like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'll go back to NLA and start training from hell
with Trigo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0015
rows.name:
This is my thanks, take it!
And someday... have a match with me again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035702_MSG0016
rows.name:
...It's a promise, alright?
I absolutely won't lose next time![ST:wait ]
